note: Explorer V13 banner + whitepaper now document the DEX + OTC P2P trading roadmap: (1) SOST DEX is ALREADY SECURE via SOSTEscrow.sol + client-side ED25519 signed offers + X25519 E2E encrypted relay; no further consensus change required. (2) OTC P2P will use atomic swap HTLC for crypto-to-crypto only (BTC/ETH/USDT/USDC/BNB/PAXG/XAUT); SOST-side consensus + wallet/RPC/CLI complete on the candidate branch, gate INT64_MAX, Phase 4 (counterparty legs) + Phase 5 (external review) pending; target activation V14 / block 15,000. (3) OTC against fiat is DELIBERATELY NOT OFFERED as a protocol feature; the SOST chain cannot verify a bank, so the protocol refuses to pretend it can; strong recommendation to keep all trades in the crypto-to-crypto path. (4) Simplicity rule documented: 5-step UI discipline (official URL, read signed fields, verify addresses against payload, confirm txids on-chain, small test transaction first) protects users without requiring crypto expertise. Anything sold outside this flow is a scam pattern. Web-only update: NO consensus, NO scripts/src/include changes, NO atomic-swap branch touched (that work stays isolated).
